item.title: Fired Michigan coach Moore reaches plea deal
item.description: Fired Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore pleaded no contest to two misdemeanors to resolve a felony home invasion case. The deal was struck on the...

item.title: UNC's Wilson (thumb surgery) done for season
item.description: North Carolina star freshman Caleb Wilson will miss the remainder of the season after breaking his right thumb during practice, the school announced.

item.title: Ogunbowale arrested following Unrivaled title win
item.description: Dallas Wings guard Arike Ogunbowale was arrested and charged with misdemeanor battery in Miami early Thursday morning after she allegedly punched a ma...

item.title: Isles land Blues captain Schenn for playoff push
item.description: The Islanders have acquired Brayden Schenn in trade that sends Jonathan Drouin, two picks and a prospect back to the Blues. Schenn, 34, had served as ...

item.title: OT Decker, longest-tenured Lion, asks for release
item.description: Offensive lineman Taylor Decker, the Lions' longest-tenured player, has requested his release, he announced on social media.
